text:
The hearing must be held to determine:

(1) Whether or not there is a reasonable possibility that a judgment may be rendered against the owner or operator as a result of the crash in which the owner or operator was involved if the issue is brought before a court of competent jurisdiction; and

(2) The amount of security that may be required of the operator or owner to satisfy any judgment for damages that may be rendered against the owner or operator.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.193 — Scope of hearing.

The hearing must be held to determine:

(1) Whether or not there is a reasonable possibility that a judgment may be rendered against the owner or operator as a result of the crash in which the owner or operator was involved if the issue is brought before a court of competent jurisdiction; and

(2) The amount of security that may be required of the operator or owner to satisfy any judgment for damages that may be rendered against the owner or operator.

subsections.text: The hearing must be held to determine:

Whether or not there is a reasonable possibility that a judgment may be rendered against the owner or operator as a result of the crash in which the owner or operator was involved if the issue is brought before a court of competent jurisdiction; and
The amount of security that may be required of the operator or owner to satisfy any judgment for damages that may be rendered against the owner or operator.
